textByHash.5e1aba099a5ad2601203825949e0ad42dae44f0e: Good day! I'm here to to teach you about group storage, and to let you access your personal bank. You can call me Maggie. How may I help you?
textByHash.303eb612202fb782f79e188ae6cbe3e372378ed4: You can access the group storage via the button in the top-left of your bank interface. Only one member of the group may access the storage at one time.
textByHash.005732789eeab7710df7c2cc6fe1840703752ae1: You will then be able to deposit and withdraw items from the group storage. You can't deposit untradeable items.
textByHash.0dc1a31f1f1e8b73554f8973602c2dc034b9e645: When you have finished, click the 'Save' button to confirm the transaction.
textByHash.00b4a6dbd440955e826052b8a994bb28e351ed04: Can I help you with anything else?
textByHash.c50ada8877120f7ac50b310e1a073237753f4776: This bank is for new adventurers only, you cannot access it as you've already started your Group Ironman journey.
